description: TAM pgd_delta sweep: pgd_delta=0.5, pgd_step_size≈0.167 (delta/mining_opt_steps). All else fixed: anchor_step=2, mining_opt_steps=3, gc_loss. Small PGD radius: expects negatives closer to x_pos, smaller neg_dist. SUCCESS: val_mse < 0.00975 and anchor_dist in (0.2, 5.0).
notes: TAM pgd_delta=0.5 variant. Smaller PGD radius: negatives generated closer to anchor_step. Expects smaller neg_dist (~0.5 from x_pos). May reduce variance in mining, potentially hurting robustness. Key diagnostic: neg_dist should be ~pgd_delta from x_pos.
